## 💡 What's the idea?
<!-- A clear description of the feature or new tool you'd like. -->

## 🧩 Is this a new tool or an improvement?
- [ ] New tool
- [ ] Improvement to existing tool: **<!-- tool name -->**
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Other

## 🤔 Why is this useful?
<!-- Who would benefit? What problem does it solve? -->

## 📐 Rough design / behavior
<!-- Optional: How do you imagine it working? Wireframes, examples, etc. -->

## 🔗 References
<!-- Similar tools elsewhere, libraries that could help, etc. -->

## 📋 Additional context
<!-- Anything else to add? -->
